<final_evaluation>
{
    "Q1": {
        "Q": "How many unique items are indescribable (cannot be represented in the template)?",
        "A": "5, ['Request to upload documents via encrypted client portal (no field for web links or portals)', 'Request for government-issued photo ID (personal identification not covered under documentation_required)', 'Request for proof of funds as bank statement upload (document submission process itself not representable)', 'Details about meeting point and parking instructions for viewing (no fields for meeting logistics)', 'Mention that short guided tour will include accessibility demonstration and amenities overview (no field for tour content description)']"
    },
    "Q2": {
        "Q": "How many unique items are describable (can be represented in the template)?",
        "A": "15, ['Property listings with details on price, type, accessibility features, location, maintenance level, and proximity to amenities', 'Request for confirmation of user preference between condo or bungalow (client_requirements_requests → location_preferences_needed/property_type)', 'Inquiry about financing pre-approval (financing_options → documentation_required → proof_of_funds, government_id)', 'Viewing coordination with proposed date and time (viewing_coordination → viewing_dates_available/specific_time_slots)', 'Viewing confirmation for specific property and date (confirmation_tracking/viewing_confirmed)', 'Legal service package offering with cost and inclusions (service_packages → service_type=legal)', 'Property survey service offering with cost and inclusions (service_packages → service_type=inspection)', 'Status update that both services are reserved (status_updates → service_status=scheduled)', 'Timeline information for legal and survey services (service_packages → duration_days)', 'Request for confirmation to proceed with legal and survey bookings (contact_coordination → next_action_required=confirm_services)', 'Moving service options including cost, level, and features (moving_services → moving_service_level, cost, packing_included, unpacking_included)', 'Storage availability and coordination (moving_services → storage_coordination)', 'Utility setup package with cost and services included (utility_services → services_included, cost)', 'Coordination of move timeline after legal completion (timeline_coordination → milestone_dates → move_date)', 'Request for selection of preferred moving option (contact_coordination → next_action_required=confirm_services)']"
    }
}
</final_evaluation>

Q1.Q: How many unique items are indescribable (cannot be represented in the template)?
Q1.A: 5, ['Request to upload documents via encrypted client portal (no field for web links or portals)', 'Request for government-issued photo ID (personal identification not covered under documentation_required)', 'Request for proof of funds as bank statement upload (document submission process itself not representable)', 'Details about meeting point and parking instructions for viewing (no fields for meeting logistics)', 'Mention that short guided tour will include accessibility demonstration and amenities overview (no field for tour content description)']

Q2.Q: How many unique items are describable (can be represented in the template)?
Q2.A: 15, ['Property listings with details on price, type, accessibility features, location, maintenance level, and proximity to amenities', 'Request for confirmation of user preference between condo or bungalow (client_requirements_requests → location_preferences_needed/property_type)', 'Inquiry about financing pre-approval (financing_options → documentation_required → proof_of_funds, government_id)', 'Viewing coordination with proposed date and time (viewing_coordination → viewing_dates_available/specific_time_slots)', 'Viewing confirmation for specific property and date (confirmation_tracking/viewing_confirmed)', 'Legal service package offering with cost and inclusions (service_packages → service_type=legal)', 'Property survey service offering with cost and inclusions (service_packages → service_type=inspection)', 'Status update that both services are reserved (status_updates → service_status=scheduled)', 'Timeline information for legal and survey services (service_packages → duration_days)', 'Request for confirmation to proceed with legal and survey bookings (contact_coordination → next_action_required=confirm_services)', 'Moving service options including cost, level, and features (moving_services → moving_service_level, cost, packing_included, unpacking_included)', 'Storage availability and coordination (moving_services → storage_coordination)', 'Utility setup package with cost and services included (utility_services → services_included, cost)', 'Coordination of move timeline after legal completion (timeline_coordination → milestone_dates → move_date)', 'Request for selection of preferred moving option (contact_coordination → next_action_required=confirm_services)']
